actions.name: REPLY
actions.description: Send a direct chat reply in the current conversation/thread. Default if the agent is responding with a message and no other action. Use REPLY at the beginning of a chain of actions as an acknowledgement, and at the end of a chain of actions as a final response. Do NOT use REPLY to send to a different channel/person or to run an email/inbox workflow — use MESSAGE (action=send) for a directed send to another channel or DM, MESSAGE inbox operations for triage/drafts, and POST to publish to a public feed.

content.text: Hi! How can I help you today?
I really like deep shades of blue. They remind me of the ocean and the night sky.
Can you explain how neural networks work?
Let me break that down for you in simple terms...
Could you help me solve this math problem?
Of course! Let's work through it step by step.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Reply in current chat only; use connector actions for external connector sends.

actions.name: IGNORE
actions.description: Call this action if ignoring the user. If the user is aggressive, creepy or is finished with the conversation, use this action. In group conversations, use IGNORE when the latest message is addressed to someone else and not to the agent. Or, if both you and the user have already said goodbye, use this action instead of saying bye again. Use IGNORE any time the conversation has naturally ended. Do not use IGNORE if the user has engaged directly, or if something went wrong and you need to tell them. Only ignore if the user should be ignored.
actions.descriptionCompressed: Ignore user when aggressive/creepy, convo ended, group msg addressed elsewhere, or both said goodbye. Don't use if user engaged directly or needs error info.

actions.name: NONE
actions.description: Respond but perform no additional action. This is the default if the agent is speaking and not doing anything additional.

content.text: did u see some faster whisper just came out
yeah but its a pain to get into node.js
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Respond without additional action. Default when speaking only.

actions.name: MESSAGE
actions.description: Primary action for addressed messaging surfaces: DMs, group chats, channels, rooms, threads, servers, users, inboxes, drafts, and owner message workflows. Choose action=send, read_channel, read_with_contact, search, list_channels, list_servers, react, edit, delete, pin, join, leave, get_user, triage, list_inbox, search_inbox, draft_reply, draft_followup, respond, send_draft, schedule_draft_send, or manage. Public feed publishing belongs to POST.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Message action: send, read_channel, read_with_contact, search, list_channels, list_servers, react, edit, delete, pin, join, leave, get_user, triage, list_inbox, search_inbox, draft_reply, draft_followup, respond, send_draft, schedule_draft_send, or manage.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Connector or inbox source such as discord, slack, signal, whatsapp, telegram, x, imessage, matrix, line, google-chat, feishu, instagram, wechat, gmail, calendly, or browser_bridge.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Optional connector account id for multi-account message connectors.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Optional inbox sources for action=triage, list_inbox, or search_inbox.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Loose target reference: user, handle, channel, room, group, server, contact, phone, email, or platform-specific ID.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Loose channel, room, or group name/reference.

parameters.name: server
parameters.description: Loose server, guild, workspace, or team name/reference.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text for action=send or replacement text for action=edit.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term for action=search or action=search_inbox.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Inbox search text or message lookup hint for draft/respond/manage operations.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: Sender identifier, handle, or display name for inbox search or reply lookup.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Draft or response body for action=draft_reply, draft_followup, or respond.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Recipient identifiers for action=draft_followup.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Optional subject for email-like draft operations.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Platform message ID, full message ID, or stored memory ID for react/edit/delete/pin/respond/manage.

parameters.name: draftId
parameters.description: Draft identifier for action=send_draft or action=schedule_draft_send.

parameters.name: confirmed
parameters.description: Whether the user explicitly confirmed sending for action=send_draft.

parameters.name: sendAt
parameters.description: Scheduled send time for action=schedule_draft_send.

parameters.name: emoji
parameters.description: Reaction value for action=react.

parameters.name: pin
parameters.description: Pin state for action=pin. Use false to unpin when supported.

parameters.name: manageOperation
parameters.description: Management action for action=manage, such as archive, trash, spam, mark_read, label_add, label_remove, tag_add, tag_remove, mute_thread, or unsubscribe.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label for action=manage when adding or removing labels.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag for action=manage when adding or removing tags.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages/channels/servers/inbox items to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor for read/search/list operations.

parameters.name: sinceMs
parameters.description: Start timestamp in milliseconds for inbox list/search/triage operations.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Start timestamp or parseable date for action=search_inbox.

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: End timestamp or parseable date for action=read_channel range=dates or action=search_inbox.

content.text: Send a message to @dev_guru on telegram saying 'Hello!'
Message sent to dev_guru on telegram.

exampleCalls.user: Send a message to @dev_guru on telegram saying "Hello!"

actions.descriptionCompressed: primary message action operations send read_channel read_with_contact search list_channels list_servers react edit delete pin join leave get_user triage list_inbox search_inbox draft_reply draft_followup respond send_draft schedule_draft_send manage dm group channel room thread user server inbox draft

actions.name: POST
actions.description: Primary action for public feed surfaces and timelines. Choose action=send to publish a post, action=read to fetch recent feed posts, or action=search to search public posts. Addressed DMs, groups, channels, rooms, and inbox/draft workflows belong to MESSAGE.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Post action: send, read, or search.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Post connector source such as x, bluesky, farcaster, nostr, or instagram.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Optional connector account id for multi-account post connectors.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Public post text for action=send.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Loose feed target for action=send/read, such as a user, channel, media id, or connector-specific reference.

parameters.name: feed
parameters.description: Feed convention for action=read, such as home, user, hashtag, channel, or connector-specific feed.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term for action=search.

parameters.name: replyTo
parameters.description: Post/comment/reply target for action=send.

parameters.name: mediaId
parameters.description: Media id for connector-specific comment surfaces such as Instagram.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor for action=read or action=search.

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Optional post attachments.

content.text: Post this on X: shipping today

exampleCalls.user: Post this on X: shipping today

actions.descriptionCompressed: primary post action ops send read search public feed timeline posts

actions.name: ROOM
actions.description: Manage current room participation state. Use action=follow to opt into a room, action=unfollow to stop following, action=mute to ignore messages unless mentioned, or action=unmute to resume normal room activity.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Room operation: follow, unfollow, mute, or unmute.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Optional target room id. Defaults to the current room when omitted.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Room action=follow|unfollow|mute|unmute; current room by default.

actions.name: ROLE
actions.description: Assign or update trust roles for users. Use action=update with entityId and role when the owner explicitly asks to change permissions.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Role operation. Currently update.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: Entity id whose role should be updated.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Role to assign.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Role action=update; assign trust role to entity.

actions.name: SEARCH_EXPERIENCES
actions.description: Search the agent experience store for prior events, decisions, summaries, or memories relevant to the current request.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

actions.name: CHARACTER
actions.description: Manage the agent character profile and identity. Use action=modify for temporary changes, action=persist to save approved changes, or action=update_identity for identity-level updates.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Character operation: modify, persist, or update_identity.

parameters.name: updates
parameters.description: Structured or textual character updates.

actions.name: CHOOSE_OPTION
actions.description: Select an option for a pending task that has multiple options.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The pending task id.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: The selected option name exactly as listed.

content.text: I've selected option 1 for the pending task.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Select option for pending multi-choice task.

actions.name: ATTACHMENT
actions.description: Read current or recent attachments and link previews, or save readable attachment content as a document. Use action=read for extracted text, transcripts, page content, or media descriptions. Use action=save_as_document to store readable attachment content in the document store.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Attachment operation: read or save_as_document.

parameters.name: attachmentId
parameters.description: Optional attachment ID to read or save. Omit to use the current or most recent attachment.

parameters.name: addToClipboard
parameters.description: When true with action=read, store the attachment content in bounded task clipboard state.
parameters.descriptionCompressed: Store read result in task clipboard.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional title when saving attachment content as a document.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Attachment action=read or save_as_document; current/recent files, link previews, extracted text, transcripts, media descriptions.

actions.name: GENERATE_MEDIA
actions.description: Generates media based on a prompt and media type. Use GENERATE_MEDIA when the agent needs to create an image, video, music, sound effect, or speech audio for the user.

parameters.name: mediaType
parameters.description: The kind of media to generate.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Detailed generation prompt describing the desired media.
examples: A futuristic cityscape at sunset, cinematic lighting

parameters.name: audioKind
parameters.description: For audio generation, choose music, sfx, or tts.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Optional target duration in seconds for video or audio.

parameters.name: aspectRatio
parameters.description: Optional video aspect ratio such as 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Optional image size or image provider size preset.

content.text: Can you show me what a futuristic city looks like?
Sure, I'll create a futuristic city image for you. One moment...
Make a five second clip of waves rolling in.
Compose a mellow synth track for studying.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Generate image, video, or audio from prompt.

actions.name: PAYMENT
actions.description: Payment operations. Use action=create_request to create a payment request, deliver_link to send a payment link, verify_payload to verify a provider proof, settle to finalize a payment, await_callback to wait for settlement, and cancel_request to void a pending request.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Payment operation: create_request, deliver_link, verify_payload, settle, await_callback, or cancel_request.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: For action=create_request, provider key: stripe, oxapay, x402, or wallet_native.

parameters.name: amountCents
parameters.description: For action=create_request, amount in minor currency units.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: For action=create_request, ISO 4217 currency.

parameters.name: paymentContext
parameters.description: For action=create_request, payer constraint. kind can be any_payer, verified_payer, or specific_payer; scope can be one_time, session, or recurring.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: For action=create_request or cancel_request, payment or cancellation reason.

parameters.name: expiresInMs
parameters.description: For action=create_request, optional time-to-live override in milliseconds.

parameters.name: paymentRequestId
parameters.description: For deliver_link, verify_payload, settle, await_callback, and cancel_request: payment request ID.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: For action=deliver_link, delivery channel.

parameters.name: targetChannelId
parameters.description: For action=deliver_link, optional delivery channel override.

parameters.name: proof
parameters.description: For action=verify_payload or settle, provider proof payload.

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: For action=settle, optional settler strategy hint.

parameters.name: timeoutMs
parameters.description: For action=await_callback, wait timeout in milliseconds. Default is 600000.

content.text: Create a $10 payment request for the workshop.
Send the payment link to the payer.

actions.name: TRUST
actions.description: Trust system control. action=evaluate reads a trust profile for an entity; record_interaction logs a trust-affecting event; request_elevation requests temporary permissions; update_role assigns OWNER / ADMIN / NONE roles within a world.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: evaluate | record_interaction | request_elevation | update_role.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: Target entity ID. evaluate: defaults to sender. record_interaction: target of the interaction (defaults to agent).

parameters.name: entityName
parameters.description: Optional target entity name (evaluate). Name-only lookups return a bounded failure; provide entityId where possible.

parameters.name: detailed
parameters.description: Whether evaluate should return detailed dimensions (default false).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Trust evidence type (record_interaction).

parameters.name: impact
parameters.description: Numerical trust impact (record_interaction). Default 10.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional interaction description (record_interaction).

parameters.name: permissionAction
parameters.description: Permission action being requested (request_elevation).

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource scope for elevation (request_elevation).

parameters.name: justification
parameters.description: Reason elevation is needed (request_elevation).

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Requested duration in hours (request_elevation). Defaults to 60.

parameters.name: roleAssignments
parameters.description: Role assignments (update_role).

content.text: Trust Level: Good (65/100) based on 42 interactions
Record that Alice kept their promise to help with the project
Trust interaction recorded: PROMISE_KEPT with impact +15
I need permission to manage roles to help moderate spam
Elevation approved! You have been granted temporary manage_roles permissions.
